hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.tsx|*.jsx|*.ts|*.js) npx prettier --write "$f"; npx eslint --fix "$f";; *.md) npx prettier --write "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
